compiled.prompt: Tactile styling reference for a monochrome accessories shoot. Color palette: #050505, #8b8f96, #e5e7eb. Element 1 — black leather cutout: include as texture or surface quality, lighting reference. Element 2 — silver hardware: include as subject or object, composition reference. Mood and intent: restrained, expensive, macro detail. Generate a single cohesive image that combines the above.
